create: Build a simple todo list. Each todo has a title and a done flag. Tap to toggle done. Persist todos in Fireproof.

Build a property inspection report. Each inspection has an address, date, and a list of checklist items where each item has a label, a status (pass/fail/n-a), and a free-form note. Persist in Fireproof.
Build a shopping list. Each item has a name, quantity, and a bought flag. Tap to toggle bought. Persist in Fireproof.
Build a recipe collection. Each recipe has a name, ingredient list, and steps. Persist in Fireproof.
Build a time tracker. Each entry has a task name, start time, end time, and notes. Show today's total minutes. Persist in Fireproof.
Build a poetry app where only the owner can post new poems but anyone with the link can read them. Each poem has a title and body. Persist in Fireproof.
